tools.name: mioffice_list_tools
tools.description: List the full MiOffice applications with pricing tier per tool. Optionally filter bby category.

tools.name: mioffice_open_tool
tools.description: Return the URL for a specific MiOffice application by name or search term. Includes pricing info so the user knows the cost before invoking.

tools.name: mioffice_pricing_info
tools.description: Return MiOffice's current pricing model — welcome credits, Day Pass, and one-time credit packs. LLM should relay this to users before invoking any paid tool.

tools.name: mioffice_pdf_editor
tools.description: Open MiOffice PDF Editor — annotate, highlight, fill forms, sign, watermark. Light WASM, free on Day Pass.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "mio_pdf_unlock" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Unlock PDF — Remove password protection from PDF files. Runs in the browser. Covered by signup welcome credits and by the Day Pass (24-hour unlimited on this wo…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
